_comment: G5 — the compound reject-merge decision (design §2.2): ONE append that three folds read — the edge fold as retraction (support 2→1), the working-set fold as reopen, resolve's candidate filter as a permanent pair-block — and the done-marker key gains an epoch suffix so the Block driver re-admits the reopened event. Re-resolve finds its only candidate blocked, so the event seeds its OWN claim at $0; the torn-out pair never re-forms.
